steps.speaker: mayor
steps.text: Welcome to English Learning Town! I'm Mayor Johnson.

steps.speaker: mayor
steps.text: Can you say 'Hello Mayor Johnson' to greet me?
steps.onSuccess: Great pronunciation! Welcome to our town!
steps.onRetry: Try again! Say: Hello Mayor Johnson

steps.speaker: librarian
steps.text: Welcome to the library! I'm Ms. Books, the librarian.

steps.speaker: librarian
steps.text: Libraries are quiet places. Can you whisper 'I love reading'?
steps.onSuccess: Perfect whisper! You understand library etiquette.
steps.onRetry: Remember to speak softly in the library. Try: I love reading

steps.speaker: shopkeeper
steps.text: Hello there! Welcome to my shop! I'm Bob.

steps.speaker: shopkeeper
steps.text: When you want to buy something, you say 'I would like to buy'. Can you try that?
steps.onSuccess: Excellent! That's how you politely ask to buy something!
steps.onRetry: Try the polite way: I would like to buy
